laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Rules, 2003
laws.title: Composition of the Service and its classification
laws.description: Constitutes the National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli Civil Service consisting of persons appointed under rules 6 and 7, with four grades as specified in Schedule I.
laws.simpleExplanation: Creates the Civil Service for the specified territories consisting of four grades.

laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Rules, 2003
laws.title: Probation
laws.description: Every officer on appointment to the Entry Grade of the Service either by direct recruitment or by promotion shall be on probation for a period of two years, with provision for extension.
laws.simpleExplanation: Sets a two-year probation period for new appointments, which may be extended.

laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Rules, 2003
laws.title: Disqualification
laws.description: Disqualifies any person who has a living spouse and contracts another marriage, or contracts a marriage with a person having a spouse living from appointment, unless exempted by the Central Government.
laws.simpleExplanation: Prohibits bigamy for appointment to the service unless exempted.
